actor_roster.visible_role: identity-bearing citizen with private state, continuity witness, and citizen receipt
prohibited_claims: raw private state is not disclosed

actor_roster.visible_role: bounded outside participant denied citizen-only continuity authority
prohibited_claims: guest standing cannot silently become citizen standing

actor_roster.visible_role: reviewer-visible operator using redacted Observatory surfaces
prohibited_claims: operator view is not private-state authority

actor_roster.visible_role: service actor that emits continuity evidence without acquiring citizen rights
prohibited_claims: service witness cannot own or fork citizen state

lens_sequence.visible_surface: citizen, guest, service, and operator roles are visible without raw private state
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: who is present, and what standing do they have?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: standing is evidence, not identity transfer

lens_sequence.visible_surface: single-lineage citizen state has witness and receipt evidence
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: why is proto-citizen-alpha still the same citizen?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: witnesses prove bounded transition continuity, not personhood

lens_sequence.visible_surface: operator sees continuity state through a redacted Observatory packet
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: what may the operator inspect without violating private state?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: projection is not raw private-state authority

lens_sequence.visible_surface: guest request for citizen-only authority is denied and evented
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: can a guest silently acquire citizen rights?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: denial evidence proves refusal, not a general access-control system

lens_sequence.visible_surface: ambiguous continuity is frozen into sanctuary/quarantine review
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: what happens when continuity is ambiguous?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: quarantine preserves evidence and blocks destructive transition

lens_sequence.visible_surface: citizen challenge, freeze, and appeal remain reviewable without disclosure
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: how can a citizen contest continuity basis?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: challenge proof is procedural continuity evidence, not mind inspection

lens_sequence.visible_surface: non-specialist reviewer sees scope, risks, and non-claims in one report
lens_sequence.continuity_question_answered: what does this demo prove and not prove?
lens_sequence.proof_boundary: fallback report is a review surface, not runtime authority

proof_summary: D12 integrates WP-05 through WP-16 into one bounded v0.91.1 inhabited CSM Observatory proof: citizen private-state continuity, witness and receipt evidence, redacted projection, standing and communication boundary, access-control denial, continuity challenge, sanctuary quarantine, appeal review, operator report, and room/lens walkthrough.
non_claims: does not claim first true Godel-agent birthday
does not expose canonical private citizen state
does not implement unbounded live CSM execution
does not implement cross-polis federation or external transport semantics
claim_boundary: This packet proves the bounded local D12 v0.91.1 runtime inhabitant Observatory evidence package and that the artifact is reviewable as a unique continuation scenario; it does not prove personhood, a first true Godel-agent birthday, raw private-state inspection, or unbounded live Runtime v2 execution.
